description_long: This is a rectangular, vacuum-sealed package of Paulig Paula Kahvia-Kaffe coffee, wrapped in a yellow and brown printed wrapper. The front and back faces feature a vintage-style illustration of a smiling woman in traditional dress, holding a cup of coffee, with the Olympic rings and the brand name 'PAULA KAHVIA-KAFFE' prominently displayed. The sides of the package contain detailed product information, preparation instructions, and an illustration of a building, all in multiple languages. The packaging appears to be made of a combination of paper and foil, giving it a slightly glossy, crinkled appearance. The overall design is retro, with bold, contrasting colors and clear branding. The package is compact and block-shaped, typical for ground coffee products.
description: A yellow and brown vacuum-sealed package of Paulig Paula Kahvia-Kaffe coffee, featuring vintage illustrations and Olympic branding. The wrapper is glossy with detailed product information and retro graphics.
description_view_0: Front view shows a woman in traditional dress holding a coffee pot, the Olympic rings, and the 'PAULA KAHVIA-KAFFE' branding.
description_view_1: Side view displays preparation instructions and illustrations for making coffee, with text in multiple languages.
description_view_2: Opposite face features the same woman, now holding a coffee cup, with the same branding and Olympic rings.
description_view_3: Other side shows a building illustration, additional product information, and the Paulig logo, with more text.
attribute_brand_logo: The Paulig logo is visible on the front and back lower sections, in white text on a dark background. The Olympic rings, in blue, yellow, black, green, and red, are also prominently displayed above the illustration of the woman.
attribute_packaging_type: vacuum-sealed laminated paper and foil package
attribute_promotional_graphics: Olympic rings and a vintage illustration of a woman in traditional dress on the front and back faces, suggesting a promotional tie-in with the Olympics.
